meaning: 假设，假定；承担；呈现
example: - I assume you have read the report.

meaning: n. 假定, 自负, 担任, 假装\n[经] 假定, 承担
example: - The argument rests on the questionable assumption that economic growth always leads to improved well-being.

meaning: 保证，确保；使确信
example: - I can assure you of the quality.

meaning: n. 保证, 把握, 信心, 保险\n[经] 保证, 担保, 保险
example: - Her calm demeanor gave the investors assurance that the project would be completed on time.

root: as(朝向)+sign(标记)→标记给某人→分配
meaning: vt. 分配, 指派, 赋值\n[计] 赋值
example: - The professor assigned each student a research topic for the term paper.

meaning: n. 分配, 功课, 任务, 转让, 归因, 陈述\n[计] 赋值
example: - The professor announced a challenging research assignment due next Friday.

root: as(加强)+sist(站立)→站在一旁帮助→协助
meaning: n. 帮助, 协助\nvt. 帮助, 促进\nvi. 协助, 参加
example: - The research assistant will assist the professor in collecting and analyzing data.

meaning: n. 协助, 援助\n[经] 援助, 帮助
example: - The research project was completed with the assistance of several graduate students.

meaning: n. 低估\nvt. 低估, 看轻
example: - Many investors underestimated the long-term impact of regulatory changes on the tech sector.

meaning: vt. 遭受, 经历, 忍受\n[法] 经受, 经历, 忍受
example: - All candidates must undergo a rigorous background check before employment.

root: under(低于)+graduate(毕业生)→尚未毕业的学生→本科生
meaning: n. 大学本科生, 大学肄业生\na. 大学生的
example: - Many undergraduates participate in research projects alongside faculty members.

root: under(在...下)+lie(躺)→躺在下面→构成基础
meaning: vt. 位于...之下, 成为...的基础
example: - Economic inequality underlies many social problems in modern societies.

root: under(在...下)+line(线)→在下面划线→强调
meaning: vt. 在...下面划线, 作...的衬里, 强调\nn. 下划线, 图下说明文字\n[计] 加下划线; 下划线
example: - The author underlines the urgency of climate action in the concluding paragraph.

root: under(在下/不足)+ly+-ing(正在…/…的动作/…的)
meaning: a. 在下面的\n[经] 优先的, 基础的, 放在下面的
example: - The underlying cause of the economic crisis was a lack of regulatory oversight.

meaning: vt. 在...下面挖, 渐渐破坏, 暗地里破坏\n[法] 暗中破坏, 以阴谋中伤伤害
example: - His constant criticism undermined her confidence before the presentation.

meaning: adv. 在下面\nprep. 在...的下面
example: - The keys were hidden underneath the floorboard.

root: roy(国王)+al(形容词后缀)→国王的
meaning: n. 王室, 皇族\na. 王室的, 皇家的, 盛大的, 庄严的
example: - The royal family attended the ceremony at Westminster Abbey.

root: vulner(受伤)+able(能)→能受伤的→易受伤害的
meaning: a. 易受伤害的, 有弱点的, 易受影响的, 脆弱的, 成局的\n[医] 易损的
example: - Children in war zones are especially vulnerable to psychological trauma.

meaning: n. 耙子, 钱耙, 斜度, 浪子\nv. 搜索, 掠过, (用耙子)耙, (使)倾斜
example: - He used a rake to gather the fallen autumn leaves into neat piles.

meaning: n. 扳钳, 扳手, 扭伤, 歪曲, 痛苦\nvt. 猛扭, 扭伤, 曲解, 折磨\nvi. 猛扭, 猛绞
example: - He tightened the loose bolt with a wrench.

root: court(宫廷)+esy(名词)→宫廷礼仪→礼貌
meaning: n. 礼貌, 谦恭, 好意\n[法] 优待, 礼貌, 恩惠
example: - It is common courtesy to hold the door open for the person behind you.

meaning: vi. 足够, 有能力\nvt. 满足
example: - A brief explanation will suffice for now.

meaning: n. 技师\n[化] 技师
example: - The laboratory technician calibrated the equipment before the experiment began.

meaning: n. 改进, 修补, 好转\nvt. 修改, 改进, 加快, 修理\nvi. 好转, 改善
example: - The government has introduced new policies to mend the strained relations with neighboring countries.

root: im(加强)+per(命令)+ative(形容词)→命令的→必要的
meaning: n. 命令, 必要的事, 规则, 祈使语气\na. 命令式的, 急需的, 势在必行的, 强制的
example: - It is imperative that we address climate change before its effects become irreversible.

meaning: n. 努力, 尽力\nvi. 努力, 尽力
example: - Her endeavor to bridge cultural gaps through education has earned widespread recognition.

meaning: n. 课程\n[医] 课程, 学程
example: - The university has revised its curriculum to include more interdisciplinary courses.

meaning: a. 芬香的, 馥郁的, 愉快的
example: - The garden was filled with fragrant roses blooming in early summer.

meaning: n. 全体人员, 一群人, 全体队员\ncrow的过去式
example: - The film crew spent three months shooting on location in Iceland.

meaning: n. 轴, 箭杆, 矛, 矿井\nvt. 装杆于, 利用
example: - The engineer inspected the drive shaft for signs of wear before the machine was restarted.
